cd /home/jose/moreno-ai && python3 -c "
import sys, json
sys.path.insert(0, 'runtime')
from agent_identity_loader import load_agent
from relationship_runtime import reinit_canonical_relationships, list_relationships

agents = ['sakura', 'remy', 'megabyte', 'larry', 'sentinel']
total_written = 0
for name in agents:
    identity = load_agent(name)
    written = reinit_canonical_relationships(identity)
    total_written += len(written)
    print(f'{name}: {len(written)} reinitialised')
    for r in written:
        schema = r.get('schema_version','?')
        sentinel_type = r.get('governance',{}).get('sentinel_type', False)
        flag = ' [SENTINEL-TYPE]' if sentinel_type else ''
        has_history = bool(r.get('relationship_history','').strip())
        print(f'  -> {r[\"to_agent\"]}: {r[\"relationship_type\"]}{flag} schema={schema} history={has_history}')
print(f'TOTAL REINITIALISED: {total_written}')
"
